$roomId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid)

game..validate: newData.hasChildren(['version','gameType','participantCount','targetScore','clockwise','names','scores','gameClock']) && newData.child('version').val() === 5 && newData.child('participantCount').isNumber() && newData.child('participantCount').val() >= 2 && newData.child('participantCount').val() <= 10 && newData.child('names').numChildren() === newData.child('participantCount').val() && newData.child('scores').numChildren() === newData.child('participantCount').val() && newData.child('history').numChildren() <= 200

$index..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id','roundNumber','winner','winnerIndex','points','timestamp']) && newData.child('id').isString() && newData.child('roundNumber').isNumber() && newData.child('roundNumber').val() >= 1 && newData.child('winner').isString() && newData.child('winner').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('winnerIndex').isNumber() && newData.child('winnerIndex').val() >= 0 && newData.child('winnerIndex').val() < 10 && newData.child('points').isNumber() && newData.child('points').val() >= 0 && newData.child('points').val() <= 100000 && newData.child('timestamp').isNumber()

$code..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid)
